name: Goldman Sachs BDC, Inc.
description: Goldman Sachs BDC, Inc. is a closed-end, externally managed, non-diversified management investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company (BDC) under the Investment Company Act of 1940. Formed to generate current income and, to a lesser extent, capital appreciation, the company primarily invests in middle-market companies in the United States, typically through senior secured debt, unitranche debt, junior secured debt, and to a lesser extent, unsecured debt and equity investments.
